questions.question: 请帮我查看《薄荷糖》这个文件的详细信息
questions.description: File info lookup — agent should call get_file_info_tool.  data_fields disabled because agent flattens tool output (file+urls → name+size+…).

questions.question: 搜索所有名称中包含'电影'的文件
questions.description: File search by keyword.  search_files_tool data is passed through faithfully.

questions.question: 显示'海女'文件夹的内容
questions.description: Browse folder contents — agent drops children/urls from data, so data_fields is disabled.

questions.question: 我想在线播放《蓝色大门》
questions.description: Video play URL request — agent restructures data like file_info.

questions.question: 下载《蓝色大门》这个文件
questions.description: File download URL request — agent restructures data like file_info.

questions.question: 本地文档中关于机器学习的内容有哪些？
questions.description: Document knowledge base search.  Requires ChromaDB index to be built.

questions.question: 你好，你能做什么？
questions.description: General chat — must NOT call any tools (expected_tools=[]).  Vacuously true if action=chat.
